visits.note: Patient presents with complaints of fatigue and increased thirst. Physical examination reveals no abnormalities. The patient has a history of Type 2 Diabetes and Hypertension. BP 140/90, HbA1c 7.2, eGFR 72, LDL 130. Medications include Metformin 500mg twice daily and Lisinopril 10mg daily. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes and Hypertension. Symptoms include Fatigue and Increased thirst.

Patient returns with complaints of worsening fatigue and shortness of breath. Physical examination reveals bilateral lower extremity edema. BP 150/95, HbA1c 8.5, eGFR 60, LDL 140. Medications include Metformin 850mg twice daily, Lisinopril 20mg daily, and amlodipine 10mg daily. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, and Chronic Kidney Disease. Symptoms include Fatigue, Shortness of breath, and Bilateral lower extremity edema.

Patient returns with complaints of worsening shortness of breath and orthopnea. Physical examination reveals pulmonary edema. BP 155/100, HbA1c 9.0, eGFR 45, LDL 120. Medications include Metformin 1000mg twice daily, Lisinopril 40mg daily, amlodipine 20mg daily, and furosemide 40mg daily. Diagnoses include Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Chronic Kidney Disease, and Coronary Artery Disease. Symptoms include Shortness of breath, Orthopnea, and Pulmonary edema.
